objective: Objectif: Sur le token CUSDC dans le timeframe 5m, l'algorithme utilise les indicateurs EMA + ROC pour la detection de breakouts, une combinaison positive déjà testée composée des ind1 MACD avec ind2 AROON. Le SL/TP est adapté en fonction du niveau volatilité et un risque non lineaire (SL/TP) est utilisé pour limiter les pertes.

iterations.hypothesis: Combination of EMA, ROC and Bollinger Bands with MACD, Aroon and ADX identifies trend reversal points more accurately than standalone indicators in the 5m timeframe for CUSDC token.

code.validation_error: [AST001] Erreur de syntaxe ligne 72: invalid syntax

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The proposed strategy uses multiple indicators to identify trend reversal points in the 5m timeframe for CUSDC token. The use of EMA, ROC and Bollinger Bands with MACD, Aroon and ADX increases the accuracy of trend identification compared to standalone indicators. The stop loss is set at a level that adapts to market volatility while the take profit targets are based on price crossing either the upper Bollinger band or Aroon up (uptrend) being less than 100 or ROC(10) > 0.7 respectively. However, this strategy may be sensitive to short-term fluctuations in the market and a positive return is not guaranteed.
[Backup plan] If results are poor (negative return), we would consider adjusting our stop loss to better adapt to market volatility. This could potentially limit losses while still maintaining an effective risk management approach. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), we might try optimizing parameters such as the period of Bollinger Bands or Aroon up threshold values to improve performance. Finally, if this strategy fails, we may explore other indicators and strategies that can better capture market trends in the 5m timeframe for CUSDC token.
